scripts.preview: PATH=$PWD/scripts:$PATH XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$PWD/.wrangler} opennextjs-cloudflare build && PATH=$PWD/scripts:$PATH XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$PWD/.wrangler} opennextjs-cloudflare preview -- --ip 0.0.0.0
scripts.deploy: PATH=$PWD/scripts:$PATH XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$PWD/.wrangler} opennextjs-cloudflare build && PATH=$PWD/scripts:$PATH XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$PWD/.wrangler} opennextjs-cloudflare deploy -- --keep-vars
scripts.upload: PATH=$PWD/scripts:$PATH XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$PWD/.wrangler} opennextjs-cloudflare build && PATH=$PWD/scripts:$PATH XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$PWD/.wrangler} opennextjs-cloudflare upload
